title: Basar Zero Cup Demo Source
content: Basar is a 0G-first evidence librarian. It helps users add lawful source text, ask questions through their own 0G Router credentials, inspect cited evidence, and export or publish portable growth packages to a user-controlled 0G-compatible storage endpoint.

title: Growth Package Demo Note
content: A Basar growth package records sources, claims, contribution metadata, source counts, claim counts, and the 0G ecosystem context. It is designed to move a research archive beyond a single browser without using a shared backend key.
